data.title: Global Partners LP to Host First-Quarter 2026 Financial Results Conference Call on May 8, 2026
data.description: WALTHAM, Mass.-- Global Partners LP disclosed that it will unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 before markets open on May 8, 2026. Following this, at 10:00 a.m. ET, the Partnership plans to hold a conference call for investors and analysts. Led by Eric Slifka, President and CEO, Gregory B. Hanson, CFO, and Mark Romaine, COO, the call will delve into the company's results. The call will be available to stakeholders through various channels.

data.title: NCR Voyix to Release First Quarter Earnings Results
data.description: NCR Voyix Corporation, a leading company in unified commerce (NYSE: VYX), will announce its first quarter financial results for 2026 on May 7, 2026, before the market opens. The management team will then hold a conference call at 8:00 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss the results. For those interested in joining the call, the dial-in numbers are +1 (800) 715-9871 (Toll free) or +1 (646) 307-1963. Mark your calendars for this important update from NCR Voyix.

data.title: The Arena Group to Host First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Conference Call on Friday, May 8, 2026
data.description: Arena Group Holdings, Inc. (NYSE American: AREN), a leading brand, data, and IP company known for developing, acquiring, and expanding high-performing digital assets such as TheStreet, Parade, Men’s Journal, Athlon Sports, Surfer, and ShopHQ, disclosed plans to unveil its financial outcomes for the initial quarter concluding on March 31, 2026, on Friday, May 8, 2026, ahead of the market opening. The announcement will coincide with a conference call.

data.title: Pagaya Closes $500 Million AAA-Rated Auto ABS Transaction; Demonstrating Continued Investor Confidence
data.description: Pagaya Technologies LTD. revealed that it has closed RPM-2026-2, an auto asset-backed securitization (ABS) worth a substantial $500 million. This marks the seventh year of its RPM shelf, which functions as a reliable source of top-notch collateral managed by leading auto lenders in the country. The achievement of RPM-2026-2 highlights the company's ability to provide AI-driven financial solutions effectively.

data.title: Nakamoto Announces Actively Managed Bitcoin Derivatives Program Designed to Generate Volatility Income and Hedge Downside Exposure
data.description: Nashville, Tennessee - Nakamoto Inc. revealed specifics about its Bitcoin derivatives program, which has been running since Q1 2026, as a supplement to its primary Bitcoin asset management approach. The program aims to produce periodic volatility income from a set amount of the company’s Bitcoin reserves while also hedging against downturns. Nakamoto Inc. operates under the ticker symbol NAKA on the NASDAQ.

data.title: Bitch, I’m Madonna: Madonna Partners with Grindr for Global Launch of Confessions II
data.description: In West Hollywood, California, Grindr, the leading social networking app for gay, bi, trans, and queer individuals, has revealed an unprecedented worldwide collaboration with Madonna to introduce Confessions II during Pride season. This partnership makes Grindr one of the exclusive brand collaborators for the release. Madonna's presence on the platform, beginning today, will bring a distinctive in-app experience for users globally as she assumes control over the grid.

data.title: The National Police Association Endorses the Secure Commercial Driver Licensing Act of 2025: Making America's Roads Safer for All
data.description: In Indianapolis on April 24, 2026, it was highlighted that public safety is at risk when commercial vehicle drivers struggle to comprehend English traffic signs. This issue can hinder effective communication during accidents and traffic stops, impacting law enforcement's ability to respond appropriately. Such challenges underscore the importance of ensuring all drivers can read and understand English signage to enhance road safety.

data.title: Paul R. Garcia Named Chair of Deluxe Board of Directors
data.description: In Minneapolis, Deluxe (NYSE: DLX), a reputable Payments and Data company, has appointed Paul R. Garcia as the new independent Chair of its Board of Directors. Garcia, a board member since 2020, takes over from Cheryl Mayberry McKissack, who retired earlier in the year. "I am truly humbled by this appointment," said Garcia. "Deluxe has an exceptional board and I am enthusiastic about this role within the company."

data.title: MAXISIQ Launches Dedicated AI Consulting Services Group
data.description: A recent development has placed MAXISIQ as a leader in government AI adoption. The firm, based in Herndon, Virginia, and established in April 24, 2026, is known for its expertise in defense and government contracting. MAXISIQ ensures compliance with regulations and aligns its mission with government objectives. This positions them favorably in the industry.

data.title: Boynton Beach Accounting Firm Reveals Why Most HVAC Businesses Lose Profit During Their Busiest Season
data.description: In Boynton Beach, Florida on April 24, 2026, it has been revealed that HVAC companies experience a significant increase in calls and revenue during the summer season. However, a local accounting firm, Acctsage, has found that many business owners are unintentionally losing money despite the high demand. Acctsage, a specialized firm, highlighted this issue within the industry.

data.title: Hitek Global Inc. Announces Fiscal Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: Reported from Xiamen, China on April 24, 2026, Hitek Global Inc. (Nasdaq: HKIT), a leading information technology consulting and solutions service provider based in China, disclosed its financial performance for the fiscal year ending December 31, 2025. Ms. Xiaoyang Huang, Chief Executive Officer of the Company, presented the report outlining the company's achievements and results, showcasing their notable growth and successes in the industry.

data.title: Alvotech to Report Financial Results for the First Quarter of 2026
data.description: In Reykjavik, Iceland, on April 24, 2026, Alvotech, a renowned biotechnology company trading under NASDAQ symbols ALVO and ALVO-SDB, disclosed its plan to unveil its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026. The release is scheduled for Wednesday, May 6, 2026, after the closure of the U.S. market. Specialized in developing and producing biosimilar medications to cater to patients globally, Alvotech continues its commitment to advancing healthcare solutions.

data.title: BTC Digital Ltd. Announces Completion of Georgia Computing Infrastructure Construction and Launches Strategic Transformation into AI Computing Infrastructure Platform
data.description: On April 24, 2026, a digital computing infrastructure company called BTC Digital Ltd. (NASDAQ: BTCT) shared news about its ongoing project in Georgia, United States. The company disclosed that it is currently working on a 10 MW computing infrastructure initiative.

data.title: New Report on U.S. Health Outcomes (2019-2024)
data.description: A recent report by the Healthy Americas Foundation provides insights into the advancements and possibilities within various demographics in the United States. The Executive Summary: U.S. Health Outcomes (2019–2024) presents a detailed analysis of health trends across the country. Released on April 24, 2026, in Washington, the report offers valuable information on national life expectancy statistics and healthcare improvements during the specified period. This comprehensive overview is crucial for understanding the progression and potential for further enhancements in healthcare outcomes among U.S. populations.

data.title: Allspring Closed-End Funds Declare Monthly Distributions
data.description: On April 24, 2026, in Charlotte, North Carolina, the Allspring Income Opportunities Fund (EAD), the Allspring Multi-Sector Income Fund (ERC), and the Allspring Utilities and High Income Fund (ERH) declared distributions. The funds with tickers EAD, ERC, and ERH, listed on NYSE American, made the announcements.

data.title: STANDEX ANNOUNCES TIMING OF THIRD QUARTER FISCAL 2026 RESULTS
data.description: On April 24, 2026, Standex International Corporation (NYSE: SXI) revealed plans to disclose its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal 2026 on April 30, 2026, after the market closes. The company will conduct a live Internet broadcast of its conference call at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day.

data.title: Caris Life Sciences to Present at the BofA Securities 2026 Health Care Conference and the Goldman Sachs 47th Annual Global Healthcare Conference
data.description: Caris Life Sciences®, a prominent AI TechBio company focused on precision medicine, is set to present at the BofA Securities 2026 Health Care Conference and the Goldman Sachs 2026 Health Care Conference. The announcement was made on April 24, 2026, in Irving, Texas. Caris Life Sciences® is listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CAI. The company is known for its patient-centric approach and innovative use of artificial intelligence in healthcare.

data.title: American Fusion Inc. (OTC: AMFN) Positioning Itself at Crossroads of Advanced Energy Development, Future Infrastructure
data.description: American Fusion Inc. (OTC: AMFN) revealed its feature in an editorial released by AINewsWire, a part of the Dynamic Brand Portfolio at IBN, which consists of over 75 brands. This platform is dedicated to providing financial news and distributing content for both private and public companies, as well as the investment community. This announcement was made on April 24, 2026, in New York.
